---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  eval: true
  freeze: auto
  cache: false
  warning: false
  message: false
resources:
  - figures/
  - _input_data/
---

```{=html}
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@400;500;600;700;800;900&family=Source+Serif+4:opsz,wght@8..60,400;8..60,600;8..60,700&family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
```

```{=html}
<style>
:root {
  --rc2-red:        #A93632;
  --rc2-red-dark:   #6E1F1D;
  --rc2-green:      #626A38;
  --rc2-green-dark: #2E3B24;
  --rc2-green-soft: #D7DDC5;
  --rc2-ochre:      #D99A27;
  --rc2-cream:      #F6F1E8;
  --rc2-paper:      #FFFDF7;
  --rc2-ink:        #171717;
  --rc2-muted:      #675F55;
  --rc2-line:       rgba(98,106,56,0.22);
  --rc2-shadow:     0 16px 34px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);

  --rc2-safe-gutter: clamp(0.75rem, 2.6vw, 2.25rem);
  --rc2-content-max: 1260px;
  --rc2-wide-max:    1480px;
  --rc2-xl-max:      1560px;
}

*, *::before, *::after {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

html,
body {
  width: 100% !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  overflow-x: hidden !important;
  scroll-behavior: smooth;
}

body {
  margin: 0 !important;
  background:
    linear-gradient(rgba(246,241,232,0.90), rgba(246,241,232,0.86)),
    url("figures/c2_bg.jpg");
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-size: cover;
  background-attachment: fixed;
  background-position: center top;
  color: var(--rc2-ink);
  font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
}

img,
video,
iframe,
svg,
canvas {
  max-width: 100%;
}

a {
  color: var(--rc2-red);
}

#quarto-content,
#quarto-document-content,
main,
main.content,
.page-columns,
.page-columns .content {
  min-width: 0 !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  overflow-x: hidden !important;
}

main.content {
  background: transparent;
  width: 100% !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
}

.quarto-title-block,
#title-block-header {
  display: none !important;
}

/* Navbar */
.navbar {
  box-shadow: 0 2px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.10);
  backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

.navbar .navbar-brand,
.navbar .nav-link {
  font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
}

.navbar .nav-link.active-section {
  color: var(--rc2-red) !important;
  font-weight: 800;
  border-bottom: 2px solid var(--rc2-red);
}

/* =========================================================
   HERO
   ========================================================= */
.rc2-home-hero {
  position: relative;
  width: 100vw;
  max-width: 100vw;
  margin-left: calc(50% - 50vw);
  margin-right: calc(50% - 50vw);
  min-height: clamp(620px, 88vh, 880px);
  display: grid;
  align-items: center;
  overflow: hidden;
  isolation: isolate;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 82% 14%, rgba(217,154,39,0.38), transparent 28%),
    radial-gradient(circle at 18% 82%, rgba(169,54,50,0.26), transparent 36%),
    linear-gradient(108deg, rgba(23,23,23,0.84) 0%, rgba(46,59,36,0.82) 42%, rgba(110,31,29,0.72) 100%),
    url("figures/c2_bg.jpg");
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  color: #fff;
}

.rc2-home-hero::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: 0;
  background:
    linear-gradient(
      180deg,
      rgba(0,0,0,0.40) 0%,
      rgba(0,0,0,0.10) 46%,
      rgba(0,0,0,0.56) 100%
    ),
    repeating-linear-gradient(
      135deg,
      rgba(255,255,255,0.055) 0 1px,
      transparent 1px 16px
    );
}

.rc2-home-hero::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  top: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  width: 5px;
  z-index: 1;
  background: linear-gradient(
    180deg,
    var(--rc2-ochre) 0%,
    var(--rc2-red) 50%,
    var(--rc2-green) 100%
  );
}

.rc2-home-hero-inner {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
  width: min(1360px, calc(100% - var(--rc2-safe-gutter) * 2));
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: clamp(4.8rem, 8vw, 7.5rem) 0 clamp(3rem, 5vw, 4.5rem);
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.08fr) minmax(240px, 0.36fr);
  gap: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 5rem);
  align-items: center;
}

.rc2-home-kicker {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.6rem;
  padding: 0.36rem 0.82rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(246,241,232,0.12);
  border: 1px solid rgba(246,241,232,0.24);
  color: var(--rc2-ochre);
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: clamp(0.62rem, 0.9vw, 0.76rem);
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 0.16em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
  animation: fadeSlideUp 0.7s ease both;
}

.rc2-home-kicker::before {
  content: "";
  width: 7px;
  height: 7px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--rc2-ochre);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(217,154,39,0.28);
}

.rc2-home-title {
  margin: 0.7rem 0 0;
  line-height: 0.78;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: -0.10em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  text-shadow: 0 10px 42px rgba(0,0,0,0.52);
  animation: fadeSlideUp 0.75s 0.1s ease both;
}

.rc2-home-title .line-rede {
  display: block;
  font-size: clamp(3.8rem, 9.5vw, 9rem);
  color: var(--rc2-ochre);
  letter-spacing: -0.06em;
}

.rc2-home-title .line-c2 {
  display: block;
  font-size: clamp(6.5rem, 17vw, 16rem);
  color: #fff;
  line-height: 0.76;
  -webkit-text-stroke: 2px rgba(255,255,255,0.18);
}

.rc2-title-rule {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  margin: 1.05rem 0 1.25rem;
  animation: fadeSlideUp 0.75s 0.2s ease both;
}

.rc2-title-rule::before {
  content: "";
  flex: 0 0 clamp(36px, 5vw, 72px);
  height: 3px;
  background: var(--rc2-ochre);
  border-radius: 2px;
}

.rc2-title-rule::after {
  content: "";
  flex: 1;
  height: 1px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.20);
}

.rc2-home-subtitle {
  margin: 0;
  max-width: 720px;
  color: rgba(255,253,247,0.94);
  font-family: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif;
  font-size: clamp(1.05rem, 1.9vw, 1.38rem);
  line-height: 1.58;
  text-shadow: 0 3px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.42);
  animation: fadeSlideUp 0.75s 0.28s ease both;
}

.rc2-keywords {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.55rem;
  margin: 1.2rem 0 0;
  animation: fadeSlideUp 0.75s 0.36s ease both;
}

.rc2-keyword {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  min-height: 36px;
  padding: 0.36rem 0.78rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(23,23,23,0.46);
  border: 1px solid rgba(246,241,232,0.26);
  color: rgba(255,253,247,0.93);
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: clamp(0.62rem, 0.78vw, 0.72rem);
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 0.09em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.16);
}

.rc2-keyword--red   { border-left: 4px solid var(--rc2-red); }
.rc2-keyword--green { border-left: 4px solid var(--rc2-green-soft); }
.rc2-keyword--ochre { border-left: 4px solid var(--rc2-ochre); }
.rc2-keyword--cream { border-left: 4px solid var(--rc2-cream); }

.rc2-btn-row {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  margin-top: 1.35rem;
  animation: fadeSlideUp 0.75s 0.44s ease both;
}

.rc2-btn {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 0.45rem;
  padding: 0.78rem 1.45rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  transition: transform 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease;
}

.rc2-btn--main {
  background: var(--rc2-red);
  color: #fff !important;
  box-shadow:
    0 8px 22px rgba(169,54,50,0.42),
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.14);
}

.rc2-btn--ghost {
  background: rgba(246,241,232,0.92);
  color: var(--rc2-green-dark) !important;
  border: 1.5px solid rgba(246,241,232,0.70);
  backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
}

.rc2-btn:hover {
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  box-shadow: 0 14px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.22);
}

.rc2-home-logo-card {
  align-self: center;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 1rem;
  padding: clamp(1.1rem, 2vw, 1.8rem);
  border-radius: 28px;
  background: rgba(255,253,247,0.08);
  border: 1px solid rgba(246,241,232,0.18);
  box-shadow:
    0 22px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.20),
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
  animation: fadeSlideUp 0.75s 0.18s ease both;
}

.rc2-home-logo-card img {
  width: clamp(94px, 10vw, 150px);
  filter: drop-shadow(0 12px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.36));
}

.rc2-home-logo-card-divider {
  height: 1px;
  background: rgba(246,241,232,0.15);
}

.rc2-home-logo-card p {
  margin: 0;
  color: rgba(255,253,247,0.78);
  font-family: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif;
  font-size: clamp(0.86rem, 1.15vw, 0.98rem);
  line-height: 1.5;
}

/* =========================================================
   SEÇÕES
   ========================================================= */
.rc2-section,
.content-card {
  width: min(var(--rc2-content-max), calc(100% - var(--rc2-safe-gutter) * 2));
  margin: 2.4rem auto 0;
  padding: clamp(1.25rem, 3vw, 2.4rem);
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 100% 0%, rgba(217,154,39,0.08), transparent 32%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,253,247,0.96), rgba(246,241,232,0.88));
  border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.18);
  border-top: 5px solid var(--rc2-green);
  box-shadow: var(--rc2-shadow);
  overflow: hidden;
}

.rc2-section--wide {
  width: min(var(--rc2-wide-max), calc(100% - var(--rc2-safe-gutter) * 2));
}

.rc2-section--xl,
#institutions {
  width: min(var(--rc2-xl-max), calc(100% - var(--rc2-safe-gutter) * 2));
}

.rc2-section-title {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 90px 1fr;
  gap: 0.8rem;
  align-items: center;
  margin-bottom: 1.35rem;
}

.rc2-section-title::before {
  content: "";
  height: 1px;
  background: var(--rc2-ink);
  opacity: 0.72;
}

.rc2-section-title h2 {
  margin: 0;
  padding-bottom: 0.45rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.18);
  color: var(--rc2-red);
  font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
  font-size: clamp(1.25rem, 3vw, 2.1rem);
  font-weight: 900;
  line-height: 1.05;
  letter-spacing: -0.045em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.rc2-lead,
.lead {
  margin: 0 0 1.25rem 0 !important;
  padding-left: 1rem;
  border-left: 5px solid var(--rc2-ochre);
  color: #191711 !important;
  font-family: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif !important;
  font-size: clamp(1.08rem, 2vw, 1.3rem) !important;
  line-height: 1.65 !important;
}

.rc2-section p,
.content-card p {
  color: var(--rc2-ink);
  font-size: 0.98rem;
  line-height: 1.72;
}

.rc2-pills {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.55rem;
  margin: 1.1rem 0;
}

.rc2-pill,
.pill {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.35rem;
  padding: 0.32rem 0.72rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(246,241,232,0.84);
  border: 1.5px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.28);
  color: var(--rc2-green-dark);
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.66rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 0.07em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.rc2-pill--red {
  color: var(--rc2-red);
  border-color: rgba(169,54,50,0.32);
  background: rgba(169,54,50,0.08);
}

.rc2-pill--green {
  color: var(--rc2-green-dark);
  border-color: rgba(98,106,56,0.32);
  background: rgba(98,106,56,0.09);
}

.rc2-pill--ochre {
  color: #7A5A18;
  border-color: rgba(217,154,39,0.42);
  background: rgba(217,154,39,0.10);
}

.rc2-grid-2 {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(min(100%, 280px), 1fr));
  gap: 1rem;
}

.rc2-grid-3 {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(min(100%, 260px), 1fr));
  gap: 1rem;
}

.rc2-grid-4 {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(min(100%, 220px), 1fr));
  gap: 0.9rem;
}

.rc2-card,
.proto-card,
.sites-box,
.info-box {
  position: relative;
  min-width: 0;
  padding: clamp(1rem, 2vw, 1.35rem);
  border-radius: 20px;
  background: rgba(255,253,247,0.84);
  border: 1px solid var(--rc2-line);
  box-shadow: 0 10px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.065);
  transition: transform 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease, border-color 0.18s ease;
}

.rc2-card:hover,
.proto-card:hover,
.sites-box:hover {
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  border-color: rgba(169,54,50,0.30);
  box-shadow: 0 14px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.10);
}

.rc2-card h3,
.proto-card h3,
.sites-box h3 {
  margin: 0 0 0.7rem 0;
  color: var(--rc2-green-dark);
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 0.11em;
  line-height: 1.25;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.rc2-card p,
.proto-card p,
.sites-box p {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--rc2-muted);
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

/* =========================================================
   FEATURE BAND
   Ajustado: texto mais à esquerda + fonte um pouco menor
   ========================================================= */
.rc2-feature-band {
  position: relative;
  width: 100vw;
  max-width: 100vw;
  margin: 2.6rem calc(50% - 50vw) 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  overflow-x: clip;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(246,241,232,0.96), rgba(246,241,232,0.84)),
    url("figures/c2_bg.jpg");
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
}

@supports not (overflow: clip) {
  .rc2-feature-band {
    overflow: hidden;
  }
}

.rc2-feature-title-wrap {
  width: min(var(--rc2-content-max), calc(100% - var(--rc2-safe-gutter) * 2));
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.5rem) 0 1.15rem;
}

.rc2-feature-title {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 0.5rem 1rem 0.5rem 0.72rem;
  background: var(--rc2-green-dark);
  color: var(--rc2-cream);
  border: 1px solid rgba(217,154,39,0.35);
  font-size: clamp(1.4rem, 3vw, 2.5rem);
  line-height: 1;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: -0.05em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.14);
  gap: 0.72rem;
}

.rc2-feature-title-accent {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  width: 18px;
  height: 48px;
  background: repeating-linear-gradient(
    135deg,
    rgba(246,241,232,0.92) 0 3px,
    transparent 3px 6px
  );
  border-left: 4px solid var(--rc2-ochre);
}

.rc2-feature-grid {
  display: grid;
  width: 100%;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;
  min-height: clamp(420px, 38vw, 640px);
}

.rc2-feature-photo,
.rc2-feature-panel {
  min-width: 0;
  min-height: clamp(420px, 38vw, 640px);
}

.rc2-feature-photo {
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: var(--rc2-green-dark);
}

.rc2-feature-photo img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  object-position: center;
  display: block;
  filter: saturate(0.92) contrast(1.06);
  transition: transform 1.15s ease, filter 1.15s ease;
}

.rc2-feature-photo:hover img {
  transform: scale(1.045);
  filter: saturate(1.02) contrast(1.10);
}

.rc2-feature-photo::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.04), rgba(0,0,0,0.22)),
    repeating-linear-gradient(
      135deg,
      rgba(255,255,255,0.045) 0 1px,
      transparent 1px 18px
    );
  pointer-events: none;
}

.rc2-feature-panel {
  position: relative;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: space-between;
  padding:
    clamp(1.15rem, 2vw, 1.95rem)
    clamp(0.95rem, 1.55vw, 1.35rem)
    clamp(0.9rem, 1.4vw, 1.2rem)
    clamp(0.88rem, 1.45vw, 1.2rem);
  color: #fff;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.rc2-feature-panel::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background:
    repeating-linear-gradient(
      135deg,
      rgba(255,255,255,0.035) 0 1px,
      transparent 1px 18px
    );
  pointer-events: none;
  opacity: 0.7;
}

.rc2-feature-panel > * {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
}

.rc2-feature-panel--sites {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #5F6A38 0%, #52602F 100%);
}

.rc2-feature-panel--gradients {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #2E3B24 0%, #26331F 100%);
}

.rc2-feature-panel--products {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #935912 0%, #7B261E 100%);
}

.rc2-feature-panel h3 {
  width: fit-content;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0.42rem 0.86rem;
  background: rgba(110,31,29,0.88);
  color: var(--rc2-cream);
  border-left: 5px solid var(--rc2-ochre);
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.74rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 0.14em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  line-height: 1.25;
}

.rc2-feature-panel p {
  margin: 0 !important;
  max-width: 12ch;
  color: rgba(255,253,247,0.98) !important;
  font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif !important;
  font-size: clamp(1.08rem, 1.48vw, 1.68rem) !important;
  line-height: 1.10 !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
  letter-spacing: -0.035em !important;
  text-transform: uppercase !important;
  text-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.20);
  overflow-wrap: normal;
  word-break: normal;
  hyphens: none;
}

.rc2-feature-panel-num {
  align-self: flex-end;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.14);
  font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
  font-size: clamp(2.6rem, 4.2vw, 4.6rem);
  font-weight: 900;
  line-height: 1;
  letter-spacing: -0.08em;
  user-select: none;
}

/* =========================================================
   ANIMAÇÕES
   ========================================================= */
@keyframes fadeSlideUp {
  from {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(24px);
  }
  to {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(0);
  }
}

.reveal-ready {
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateY(40px);
  transition:
    opacity 0.72s ease,
    transform 0.72s cubic-bezier(.2,.7,.2,1);
  transition-delay: var(--reveal-delay, 0ms);
  will-change: opacity, transform;
}

.reveal-ready.is-visible {
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translateY(0);
}

.rc2-feature-band.reveal-ready {
  transform: translateY(42px);
}

.rc2-feature-band.reveal-ready.is-visible {
  transform: translateY(0);
}

@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  .reveal-ready,
  .rc2-feature-band.reveal-ready {
    opacity: 1 !important;
    transform: none !important;
    transition: none !important;
  }
}

/* =========================================================
   RESPONSIVO
   ========================================================= */
@media (max-width: 1180px) {
  .rc2-home-hero-inner {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .rc2-home-logo-card {
    max-width: 420px;
  }

  .rc2-feature-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }

  .rc2-feature-photo,
  .rc2-feature-panel {
    min-height: 360px;
  }

  .rc2-feature-panel {
    padding:
      1.05rem
      0.95rem
      0.9rem
      0.9rem;
  }

  .rc2-feature-panel p {
    font-size: clamp(0.98rem, 2vw, 1.32rem) !important;
    max-width: 12ch;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 980px) {
  .rc2-section-title {
    grid-template-columns: 56px 1fr;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 760px) {
  .rc2-feature-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .rc2-feature-photo,
  .rc2-feature-panel {
    min-height: 280px;
  }

  .rc2-feature-panel {
    padding: 1.25rem 1rem 1rem 1rem;
  }

  .rc2-feature-panel p {
    max-width: 20ch;
    font-size: clamp(1.08rem, 5.2vw, 1.55rem) !important;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 680px) {
  .rc2-home-hero {
    min-height: auto;
  }

  .rc2-home-title .line-c2 {
    font-size: clamp(5.5rem, 22vw, 8rem);
  }

  .rc2-feature-title {
    font-size: clamp(1.2rem, 8vw, 1.85rem);
  }

  .rc2-feature-title-accent {
    height: 38px;
  }

  .rc2-section-title {
    grid-template-columns: 34px 1fr;
  }

  .rc2-btn {
    width: 100%;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 420px) {
  :root {
    --rc2-safe-gutter: 0.65rem;
  }

  .rc2-section,
  .content-card {
    padding: clamp(1rem, 4vw, 1.35rem);
    border-radius: 22px;
  }
}

/* =========================================================
   INSTITUIÇÕES
   ========================================================= */
.inst-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(min(100%, 180px), 1fr));
  gap: clamp(0.65rem, 1.2vw, 0.95rem);
  margin-top: 1rem;
  align-items: stretch;
}

.inst-item {
  min-width: 0;
  max-width: 100%;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 0.58rem;
  padding: clamp(0.85rem, 1.2vw, 1.05rem);
  min-height: 122px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  background: rgba(255,253,247,0.88);
  border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.18);
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: transform 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease;
}

.inst-item:hover {
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  box-shadow: 0 12px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.10);
}

.inst-logo {
  width: 100%;
  height: clamp(56px, 5vw, 76px);
  object-fit: contain;
}

.inst-name {
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.62rem;
  line-height: 1.22;
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #2E3B24;
  text-align: center;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

@media (max-width: 640px) {
  .inst-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }
}

@media (max-width: 380px) {
  .inst-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}

.html-widget,
.leaflet,
.leaflet-container,
iframe {
  width: 100% !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
}
</style>
```

```{=html}
<section class="rc2-home-hero" id="inicio" aria-label="RedeC2 homepage hero">
  <div class="rc2-home-hero-inner">

    <div>
      <div class="rc2-home-kicker">Research Network · Brazil</div>

      <h1 class="rc2-home-title">
        <span class="line-rede">Rede</span>
        <span class="line-c2">C2</span>
      </h1>

      <div class="rc2-title-rule" aria-hidden="true"></div>

      <p class="rc2-home-subtitle">
        Permanent plots for understanding Caatinga and Cerrado dynamics
        across Brazil's seasonally dry ecosystems.
      </p>

      <div class="rc2-keywords" aria-label="Main keywords">
        <span class="rc2-keyword rc2-keyword--red">Caatinga</span>
        <span class="rc2-keyword rc2-keyword--green">Cerrado</span>
        <span class="rc2-keyword rc2-keyword--ochre">Permanent plots</span>
        <span class="rc2-keyword rc2-keyword--cream">Dry ecosystems</span>
      </div>

      <div class="rc2-btn-row">
        <a class="rc2-btn rc2-btn--main" href="sites/">Explore sites</a>
        <a class="rc2-btn rc2-btn--ghost" href="protocols/">See protocols</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <aside class="rc2-home-logo-card" aria-label="RedeC2 visual identity">
      <img src="figures/logoc2.png" alt="RedeC2 logo">
      <div class="rc2-home-logo-card-divider"></div>
      <p>Comparable field data for conservation, restoration and synthesis.</p>
    </aside>

  </div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<section class="rc2-section" id="rede">
  <div class="rc2-section-title"><h2>The RedeC2 network</h2></div>

  <div class="rc2-grid-2">
    <div>
      <p class="rc2-lead">
        <strong>RedeC2</strong> is a collaborative research network dedicated
        to understanding the multifunctional dynamics of Brazil's seasonally dry
        tropical ecosystems, especially Caatinga and Cerrado.
      </p>

      <p>
        Bringing together researchers from multiple institutions, the network
        integrates permanent plots, floristic inventories, functional traits and
        environmental data to investigate how plant communities are structured
        and how they respond to climatic seasonality, soil conditions and
        landscape context.
      </p>

      <p>
        Across different sites and regions, RedeC2 studies how natural gradients
        and human-driven disturbances influence vegetation structure,
        successional pathways and the spatial turnover of species.
      </p>
    </div>

    <div class="rc2-card">
      <h3>Overarching goal</h3>
      <p>
        Generate robust, comparable data that support conservation planning,
        ecological restoration and evidence-based management of dry ecosystems
        in Brazil.
      </p>

      <div class="rc2-pills" style="margin-top:1rem;">
        <span class="rc2-pill rc2-pill--green">Floristics</span>
        <span class="rc2-pill rc2-pill--red">Dynamics</span>
        <span class="rc2-pill rc2-pill--ochre">Restoration</span>
        <span class="rc2-pill">Open workflows</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<section class="rc2-feature-band" id="eixos" aria-label="RedeC2 working axes">

  <div class="rc2-feature-title-wrap">
    <div class="rc2-feature-title">
      <span class="rc2-feature-title-accent" aria-hidden="true"></span>
      Sites, data, and outputs
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="rc2-feature-grid">

    <article class="rc2-feature-photo">
      <img src="figures/canudos_dc.jpg" alt="Caatinga landscape" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
    </article>

    <article class="rc2-feature-panel rc2-feature-panel--sites" aria-label="Sites">
      <h3>Sites</h3>
      <p>Permanent plots across Caatinga and Cerrado formations.</p>
      <span class="rc2-feature-panel-num" aria-hidden="true">01</span>
    </article>

    <article class="rc2-feature-photo">
      <img src="figures/agua_limpa.jpg" alt="Cerrado landscape" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
    </article>

    <article class="rc2-feature-panel rc2-feature-panel--gradients" aria-label="Gradients">
      <h3>Gradients</h3>
      <p>Seasonality, soils, structure and landscape context.</p>
      <span class="rc2-feature-panel-num" aria-hidden="true">02</span>
    </article>

    <article class="rc2-feature-photo">
      <img src="figures/gruta_brejoes_dc.jpg" alt="Dry ecosystem field site" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
    </article>

    <article class="rc2-feature-panel rc2-feature-panel--products" aria-label="Products">
      <h3>Products</h3>
      <p>Comparable data for conservation, restoration and synthesis.</p>
      <span class="rc2-feature-panel-num" aria-hidden="true">03</span>
    </article>

  </div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<section class="rc2-section" id="workflows">
  <div class="rc2-section-title"><h2>Integrated monitoring workflow</h2></div>

  <div class="rc2-grid-4">
    <article class="rc2-card">
      <h3>01 · Permanent plots</h3>
      <p>
        Repeated measurements of woody vegetation, herbs, regeneration and
        coarse woody debris in standardized units.
      </p>
    </article>

    <article class="rc2-card">
      <h3>02 · Species and traits</h3>
      <p>
        Floristic inventories, taxonomic standardization and functional trait
        records connected to ecological gradients.
      </p>
    </article>

    <article class="rc2-card">
      <h3>03 · Environmental context</h3>
      <p>
        Climate, soil and landscape layers combined with field records for
        cross-site comparability.
      </p>
    </article>

    <article class="rc2-card">
      <h3>04 · Synthesis</h3>
      <p>
        Outputs for ecological theory, biodiversity conservation, restoration
        planning and public decision-making.
      </p>
    </article>
  </div>
</section>
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
library(htmltools)

if (requireNamespace("yaml", quietly = TRUE)) {
  logo_dir <- "figures/logo_inst"
  manifest_path <- file.path(logo_dir, "institutions.yml")

  if (file.exists(manifest_path)) {
    inst <- yaml::read_yaml(manifest_path)

    inst <- Filter(
      function(x) {
        is.list(x) &&
          !is.null(x$file) &&
          file.exists(file.path(logo_dir, x$file))
      },
      inst
    )

    inst <- inst[order(tolower(vapply(inst, `[[`, "", "name")))]

    make_tile <- function(x) {
      tile_inner <- tagList(
        tags$img(
          src = paste0("figures/logo_inst/", x$file),
          class = "inst-logo",
          alt = x$name,
          loading = "lazy",
          decoding = "async"
        ),
        tags$div(class = "inst-name", x$name)
      )

      if (!is.null(x$url) && nzchar(x$url)) {
        tags$a(
          class = "inst-item",
          href = x$url,
          target = "_blank",
          rel = "noopener",
          tile_inner
        )
      } else {
        tags$div(class = "inst-item", tile_inner)
      }
    }

    tagList(
      tags$section(
        class = "rc2-section rc2-section--xl",
        id = "institutions",
        tags$div(
          class = "rc2-section-title",
          tags$h2("Participating institutions")
        ),
        tags$div(
          class = "inst-grid",
          lapply(inst, make_tile)
        )
      )
    )
  }
}
```

```{=html}
<section class="rc2-section" id="contact">
  <div class="rc2-section-title"><h2>Contact</h2></div>

  <div class="rc2-grid-2">
    <div class="rc2-card">
      <h3>Email</h3>
      <p><a href="mailto:c2redec2@gmail.com">c2redec2@gmail.com</a></p>
    </div>

    <div class="rc2-card">
      <h3>Repository</h3>
      <p>
        <a href="https://github.com/C2rede" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
          github.com/C2rede
        </a>
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {

  const revealTargets = document.querySelectorAll(
    ".rc2-section, .content-card, .rc2-feature-band, .team-controls, .team-card"
  );

  revealTargets.forEach((el, index) => {
    el.classList.add("reveal-ready");
    el.style.setProperty("--reveal-delay", `${Math.min(index, 8) * 45}ms`);
  });

  if (
    window.matchMedia("(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)").matches ||
    !("IntersectionObserver" in window)
  ) {
    revealTargets.forEach(el => el.classList.add("is-visible"));
  } else {
    const revealObserver = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
      entries.forEach(entry => {
        if (entry.isIntersecting) {
          entry.target.classList.add("is-visible");
          revealObserver.unobserve(entry.target);
        }
      });
    }, {
      threshold: 0.10,
      rootMargin: "0px 0px -6% 0px"
    });

    revealTargets.forEach(el => revealObserver.observe(el));
  }

  const sections = document.querySelectorAll("section[id]");
  const navLinks = document.querySelectorAll(".navbar a[href]");

  if (sections.length && "IntersectionObserver" in window) {
    const navObserver = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
      entries.forEach(entry => {
        if (!entry.isIntersecting) return;

        const id = entry.target.id;

        navLinks.forEach(link => {
          const href = link.getAttribute("href") || "";
          link.classList.toggle("active-section", href.endsWith("#" + id));
        });
      });
    }, {
      rootMargin: "-35% 0px -55% 0px",
      threshold: 0
    });

    sections.forEach(section => navObserver.observe(section));
  }

});
</script>
```
